sections.paragraph:
Νέρων, ωνος, ὁ Nero, Roman emperor (54–68 a.d.) 2 Ti subscr. (Mel., HE 4, 26, 9).—Kl. Pauly IV 71–73.

subscr. subscr. = subscription

Mel. Mel. = Melito of Sardis, II a.d.—List 5

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 669
